title: Music content architecture
summary: Structuring the platform's artists, releases and related presentation content as reusable application data.

lensAssignments.rationale: The responsibility centres on defining the system model, boundaries, structure, workflows or intended operation.
This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on executable digital behaviour implemented in a website, application, interface or connected software system.
lensAssignments.lensSummary: Software and web-engineering responsibility: Structuring the platform's artists, releases and related presentation content as reusable application data.
